top_signals.title: Kotak's Jayasankar Sees Record India IPOs This Year
top_signals.summary:
India's IPO market is expected to rebound after a muted first half, with stronger fundraising driven by a robust pipeline and improving valuations.
Large deal filings, resilient domestic inflows, and positive post-listing returns are supporting momentum, despite risks from inflation, geopolitics and even the weather.
V Jayasankar, Managing Director & Deputy CEO at Kotak Investment Banking, joined Haslinda Amin on Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss the outlook and key drivers for India's equity markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Takaichi tops 2025 income rankings for Japan party heads
top_signals.summary: The prime minister earned ¥36.41 million in 2025 while the average income among nine party leaders stood at ¥24.53 million.
